blocks.text: Summarize **reductive amination** with a table + code. Link: https://example.org and a bad one [x](javascript:alert(1)).
They want a concise summary, a table, and a code snippet. Keep it tight.

## Reductive amination

A **carbonyl** + amine form an imine, then it is reduced to an amine.

| step | reagent |
|---|---|
| 1 | R-CHO + R'NH2 |
| 2 | NaBH3CN |

```python
def yield_pct(a, b):
    return round(100 * a / b, 1)
```

Note a hidden char here: recovered​.org (badged on the right).

data.name: web_search
data.content: Sodium cyanoborohydride is selective for iminium ions at mildly acidic pH (~6-7).

# Demo — rendering fidelity

> claude · account demo@local · created 2026-07-19

## Human

📎 **notes.pdf** (pdf, 12345 bytes)

Summarize **reductive amination** with a table + code. Link: https://example.org and a bad one [x](javascript:alert(1)).

---

## Assistant

> 🧠 **Thinking**
>
> They want a concise summary, a table, and a code snippet. Keep it tight.

## Reductive amination

A **carbonyl** + amine form an imine, then it is reduced to an amine.

| step | reagent |
|---|---|
| 1 | R-CHO + R'NH2 |
| 2 | NaBH3CN |

```python
def yield_pct(a, b):
    return round(100 * a / b, 1)
```

Note a hidden char here: recovered.org (badged on the right).

Sources: [Reductive amination — Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Reductive_amination)

---

## Assistant  _(branch 2/2)_

**🔧 Tool call: `web_search`**

```json
{
  "query": "NaBH3CN selectivity pH"
}
```

**↩️ Tool result (`web_search`)**

```
Sodium cyanoborohydride is selective for iminium ions at mildly acidic pH (~6-7).
```

Regenerated answer (this is branch 2 of 2).
